welcome.tagline: Your AI Agricultural Assistant • आपका कृषि मित्र
welcome.featuresSubheading: Revolutionizing Your Farm with the Power of AI
welcome.revolutionizing: Revolutionizing Your Farm with the Power of AI
welcome.featuresDescription: Samyak Setu is built from the ground up for Indian farmers. We combine AI capabilities with local wisdom to help you maximize your yield safely and effectively.
welcome.builtForFarmers: Samyak Setu is built from the ground up for Indian farmers. We combine AI capabilities with local wisdom to help you maximize your yield safely and effectively.
welcome.developedForIndia: Developed for India's prosperity. भारत की समृद्धि के लिए विकसित।
welcome.feature1Subtitle: Know Your Farm from the Inside Out
welcome.feature1Desc: Stop guessing. Simply click a photo of your soil and our advanced AI vision models will detect the soil type, quality, and potential issues instantly. Based on your exact location, you get personalized crop suggestions and fertilizer recommendations tailored specifically for you.
welcome.feature2Subtitle: Never Let the Weather Surprise You
welcome.feature2Desc: By integrating real-time weather APIs with your farm's location, Setu Mitra gives you WHAT-WHEN-HOW advisories. From predicting the perfect time to sow, to pushing urgent alerts about sudden climate shifts—protect your harvest proactively.
welcome.feature3Desc: Got a question? Just ask! Our intelligent chatbot supports speech-to-text and multi-language communication. You can even upload images of diseased leaves to get instant remedies. It's like having an agronomist in your pocket, speaking your regional language.
welcome.feature4Desc: Connect with a vast network of Indian farmers in our AI-moderated community. Share tips, discuss challenges, and compare live rates across nearby mandis to make sure you get the best possible price for your hard-earned produce.
welcome.feature5Desc: Monetize your eco-friendly farming practices. Sell carbon credits directly to verified corporate buyers in our secure marketplace. Plant trees, reduce tillage, and earn supplementary income while helping the planet.
welcome.footerMottoHi: भारत की समृद्धि के लिए विकसित।

auth.loginSubtext: Log in to continue your farming journey
auth.signupSubtext: Create an account to improve your harvest together
auth.prototypeInfo: Use OTP {{otp}} for testing. No real SMS is sent.

onboarding.locationSubtext: Accurate location helps Setu Mitra provide precise hyper-local weather alerts and soil crop suggestions.
onboarding.searchPlaceholder: Search your village, district, or PIN...
onboarding.missingSignupInfo: Missing signup information. Please go back and fill the form.
onboarding.provideLocation: Please provide your location to continue.

dashboard.subtext: Your fields are looking healthy today. The current soil moisture is optimal for the upcoming harvest cycle.
dashboard.botText: "Today is a great day for sowing!"
dashboard.uploadDesc: Use camera for instant health analysis and crop advisory.
dashboard.chatDesc: Ask questions, upload pest photos, or talk using voice chat.
dashboard.advisoryTimelineHint: Your advisory timeline will appear here as you use Soil Scan and Chat with AI.

soil.title: Soil Intelligence
soil.subtitle: Upload a photo to detect soil health instantly.
soil.tapToScan: Tap here to scan soil / upload photo
soil.imageHint: Ensure the image is clear and taken under good daylight for most accurate AI detection.
soil.mayTakeSeconds: This may take a few seconds
soil.aiVisionDetected: AI Vision has detected this soil type from your uploaded image.
soil.userSessionError: User session not found. Please log in again.

chat.botGreeting:
Namaste{{name}}! I am SamyakAI, your farming assistant. Ask me anything about agriculture, crops, soil, pests, weather, or farming schemes. 🌾

🎤 Tap the mic to speak  •  🔊 Tap the speaker on my replies to listen  •  🎙️ Toggle Voice Mode for real-time conversation
chat.voiceChatMode: 🎙️ Voice Chat Mode — Tap to speak, AI will reply with voice
chat.listening: Listening... Tap the button to stop & send

history.title: Advisory History
history.subtitle: Past reports, alerts, and AI insights mapped by time.
history.noHistoryDesc: Your complete advisory timeline — soil scans, chat conversations, and AI recommendations — will appear here as you use the platform.
history.noEntries: No entries in this category yet.
history.tipText: Start using Soil Scan or Chat with AI to generate your first advisory entries.

settings.profilePicDesc: Upload a new photo for your farmer profile. Supported formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP.
settings.logoutDesc: Clear session data and return to the Welcome portal.

helpCenter.title: Help Center
helpCenter.description: Need assistance? Reach out to Setu Mitra automatically or talk to our human support representatives.
